% Auto-generated by tools/generate_actor_catalog.py
% Requires: \usepackage{longtable} and (recommended) \usepackage{booktabs}.

\section{Actor catalog}\label{appendix:actors}
\noindent This catalog lists FUSE actors grouped by domain. The \texttt{Reads} and \texttt{Writes} columns show the first-level \texttt{dd} entries (IMAS IDSs) touched by each actor.

\subsection{Generic actor model selection}
\begin{longtable}{p{0.22\linewidth}p{0.68\linewidth}}
\toprule
\textbf{Generic actor} & \textbf{Available models (\texttt{act.\ldots.model})}\\
\midrule
\endhead
\texttt{ActorAnalyticPedestal} & :hiped\_MASTU, :TE\_MAST, :TE\_NSTX\\
\texttt{ActorAnalyticTurbulence} & GyroBohm or BgB\\
\texttt{ActorCoreTransport} & :FluxMatcher, :EPEDProfiles, :replay, or :none\\
\texttt{ActorCosting} & ARIES or Sheffield\\
\texttt{ActorCurrent} & Switch between current evolution models: SteadyStateCurrent, QED, replay, or none\\
\texttt{ActorEquilibrium} & TEQUILA, FRESCO, EGGO, CHEASE, replay, none\\
\texttt{ActorNeoclassical} & changhinton, neo, or hirshmansigmar\\
\texttt{ActorPFdesign} & :none, :uniform, :optimal\\
\texttt{ActorPedestal} & EPED, WPED, dynamic, analytic, replay, none\\
\texttt{ActorSOL} & box model\\
\texttt{ActorThermalPlant} & :fixed\_plant\_efficiency, :network, :surrogate\\
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}

\subsection{Equilibrium}
\begin{longtable}{p{0.18\linewidth}p{0.09\linewidth}p{0.33\linewidth}p{0.16\linewidth}p{0.16\linewidth}p{0.06\linewidth}}
\toprule
\textbf{Actor} & \textbf{Kind} & \textbf{Purpose} & \textbf{Reads} & \textbf{Writes} & \textbf{Notes}\\
\midrule
\endhead
\texttt{ActorCHEASE} & Specific & Runs the CHEASE fixed boundary equilibrium solver to compute MHD equilibrium from pressure and current profiles & \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pf\_active} & \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pf\_active} & \\
\texttt{ActorEGGO} & Specific & ML-based free boundary equilibrium solver using the EGGO neural network framework to compute plasma equilibrium from boundary shape and p... & \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pf\_active}, \texttt{wall} & \texttt{equilibrium} & \\
\texttt{ActorEquilibrium} & Generic & Common interface to run different equilibrium actors, managing equilibrium calculations and flux surface computations & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{magnetics}, \texttt{pf\_active}, \texttt{pulse\_schedule}, \texttt{wall} & \texttt{equilibrium} & \\
\texttt{ActorFRESCO} & Specific & Fixed boundary equilibrium solver that computes plasma equilibrium using the FRESCO code & \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pf\_active}, \texttt{wall} & \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pf\_active} & \\
\texttt{ActorTEQUILA} & Specific & Runs the fixed boundary equilibrium solver TEQUILA, computing MHD equilibrium from pressure and current profiles & \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pf\_active} & \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pf\_active} & \\
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}

\subsection{Stability}
\begin{longtable}{p{0.18\linewidth}p{0.09\linewidth}p{0.33\linewidth}p{0.16\linewidth}p{0.16\linewidth}p{0.06\linewidth}}
\toprule
\textbf{Actor} & \textbf{Kind} & \textbf{Purpose} & \textbf{Reads} & \textbf{Writes} & \textbf{Notes}\\
\midrule
\endhead
\texttt{ActorPlasmaLimits} & Specific & Evaluates and enforces plasma operational limits by running multiple limit checking models and reporting breaches & \texttt{limits} & \texttt{limits} & \\
\texttt{ActorTroyonBetaNN} & Specific & Evaluates low-n no-wall ideal MHD stability using neural network models to calculate Troyon beta limits & \texttt{equilibrium} & \texttt{mhd\_linear} & \\
\texttt{ActorVerticalStability} & Specific & Computes vertical stability metrics including stability margin and normalized growth rate for plasma vertical instabilities & \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pf\_active}, \texttt{pf\_passive} & \texttt{mhd\_linear} & \\
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}

\subsection{Pedestal}
\begin{longtable}{p{0.18\linewidth}p{0.09\linewidth}p{0.33\linewidth}p{0.16\linewidth}p{0.16\linewidth}p{0.06\linewidth}}
\toprule

\midrule
\endhead
\texttt{ActorAnalyticPedestal} & Generic & Evaluates the pedestal boundary condition (height and width) using analytic models for tokamak pedestals & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium} & \texttt{summary} & \\
\texttt{ActorEPED} & Specific & Evaluates pedestal boundary conditions (height and width) using EPED-NN model for pedestal prediction & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pulse\_schedule} & \texttt{core\_profiles} & \\
\texttt{ActorPedestal} & Generic & Evaluates the pedestal boundary condition (height and width) for plasma edge profiles, handling L-H mode transitions and various pedestal... & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pulse\_schedule}, \texttt{summary} & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{summary} & \\
\texttt{ActorWPED} & Specific & Adjusts edge temperature profiles to match a specified ratio of edge to core stored energy, used for pedestal physics modeling & \texttt{core\_profiles} & \texttt{core\_profiles} & \\
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}

\subsection{Transport}
\begin{longtable}{p{0.18\linewidth}p{0.09\linewidth}p{0.33\linewidth}p{0.16\linewidth}p{0.16\linewidth}p{0.06\linewidth}}
\toprule
\textbf{Actor} & \textbf{Kind} & \textbf{Purpose} & \textbf{Reads} & \textbf{Writes} & \textbf{Notes}\\
\midrule
\endhead
\texttt{ActorAnalyticTurbulence} & Generic & Evaluates analytic turbulence models for plasma transport, supporting GyroBohm and BgB (Bohm-gyroBohm) models & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium} & \texttt{core\_transport} & \\
\texttt{ActorCoreTransport} & Generic & Provides a common interface to run multiple core transport actors including FluxMatcher, EPEDProfiles, and replay modes & \texttt{core\_profiles} & \texttt{core\_profiles} & \\
\texttt{ActorEPEDprofiles} & Specific & Updates pedestal height and width and blends with core profiles defined by shaping factors without changing on-axis values & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pulse\_schedule} & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{core\_sources} & \\
\texttt{ActorFluxCalculator} & Compound & Provides a common interface to run multiple transport model actors for calculating turbulent and neoclassical fluxes & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium} & \texttt{core\_transport} & \\
\texttt{ActorFluxMatcher} & Compound & Evaluates transport fluxes and source fluxes and minimizes the flux-match error to achieve steady-state or time-dependent plasma profiles & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{core\_sources}, \texttt{core\_transport}, \texttt{equilibrium}, \texttt{pulse\_schedule} & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{core\_transport}, \texttt{transport\_solver\_numerics} & \\
\texttt{ActorNeoclassical} & Generic & Evaluates neoclassical transport fluxes using different models (Chang-Hinton, NEO, or Hirshman-Sigmar) & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium} & \texttt{core\_transport} & \\
\texttt{ActorQLGYRO} & Specific & Evaluates QLGYRO predicted turbulence using quasilinear gyrokinetic transport modeling & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium} & \texttt{core\_transport} & \\
\texttt{ActorTGLF} & Specific & Evaluates turbulent transport fluxes using TGLF (Trapped Gyro-Landau Fluid) and related models including TGLFNN neural network surrogate,... & \texttt{core\_profiles}, \texttt{equilibrium} & \texttt{core\_transport} & \\
\bottomrule
\end{longtable}
